title: Lesson 870: 油絵, 甘える, 甘口...

items.gloss: to behave like a spoiled child; to fawn on; to take advantage of; to presume upon (e.g. another's benevolence); to depend on
sweet flavour; sweet flavor; mildness; flattery; stupidity
sky; heaven; God; svarga (heaven-like realm visited as a stage of death and rebirth); deva (divine being of Buddhism); top (of a book); sole (of a Japanese sandal); beginning; start; tempura
